_format.note: Attachments modify the player's three base moves (press, hold, yield). Each attachment has a key (id), name (display, sentence case institutional), voice (short prose line shown beneath the attachment in the dossier — the protagonist's reason for carrying it), desc (mechanical), trigger (when it fires: 'on_win_press', 'on_win_hold', 'on_win_yield', 'on_clash', 'on_loss_press', 'passive', 'on_session_start'), effect (key into session.js handler). Carried in the player's loadout; can be earned at Consult nodes.

resolve.name: Resolve
resolve.voice: I came in with more in me than they wrote down.
resolve.desc: Begin each session with +2 composure (carries above max).

steady.name: Steady
steady.voice: When I do not give, the room is mine for a moment.
steady.desc: When HOLD beats YIELD, gain 1 composure.

reach.name: Reach
reach.voice: When I lean in, they hear me a moment longer.
reach.desc: When PRESS beats HOLD, the patient's next move deals -1 damage to you.

listen.name: Listen
listen.voice: When I step back, the room speaks.
listen.desc: When YIELD beats PRESS, the patient's next tell is truthful.

insist.name: Insist
insist.voice: I keep the question in the room.
insist.desc: All your successful PRESS strikes deal +1 damage. Clashes cost you +1.

lock.name: Lock
lock.voice: The door I stand at, I stand at.
lock.desc: Clashes cost you 0 damage instead of 1.

open.name: Open
open.voice: When I give and they give, neither of us is the smaller.
open.desc: When you and the patient both YIELD, gain 2 composure.

familiar.name: Familiar
familiar.voice: I have read the file before. Of someone.
familiar.desc: In your first encounter with any patient, all their tells are truthful for the first 3 beats.

brace.name: Brace
brace.voice: When the line gives, I take less with me.
brace.desc: All damage you take is reduced by 1 (minimum 1).

patient.name: Patient
patient.voice: I am one of them. I have been since admission.
patient.desc: Once per session, you may OBSERVE: yield this beat. Their next tell will be truthful.

compose.name: Compose
compose.desc: Heal 3 composure between sessions, in addition to the standard rest.

remember.name: Remember
remember.voice: Once seen, they do not leave me.
remember.desc: Once-per-session: reveal the patient's fixation. (Otherwise revealed by the archive after enough encounters.)
